creator: wollman@khavrinen.lcs.mit.edu
text:
<<On Tue, 28 Oct 1997 13:32:12 -0800 (PST), "Jin Guojun[ITG]" <jin@pesto.lbl.gov> said:

> ix driver
> ^^
>       Intel InterExpress

> should be

> fxp driver

No.  The `fxp' driver is for the Intel EtherExpress Pro/100B.  It does
not support the Intel EtherExpress.

-GAWollman
